title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Sasken Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Sasken Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Sasken Technologies in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Sasken Technologies:
Sasken Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sasken Technologies!
